Notes: Most studied performance supplement. 5g/day loading not required. Mix with water or protein shake.
2-3g EPA/DHA daily. Take with fat-containing meal for best absorption. Anti-inflammatory and cardiovascular support.
400mg elemental magnesium. Glycinate form is best tolerated. Most athletes are deficient especially with high sweat rates.
3000-5000 IU D3 with 100mcg K2. K2 directs calcium to bones not arteries. Indoor athletes especially deficient.
Sodium/Potassium/Magnesium blend. Critical during doubles preseason and multi-event days. Prevents performance decline from dehydration.
25-40g post-training. Isolate preferred for athletes with mild lactose sensitivity. Complete amino acid profile.
480mg daily. Reduces DOMS and exercise-induced muscle damage. Particularly effective for back-to-back competition days.
25mg zinc + 2mg copper. Heavy training depletes zinc rapidly. Copper required to balance zinc supplementation.
NSF Certified for Sport. Fills micronutrient gaps from high training volume and limited dietary variety. Insurance policy.
30-50 billion CFU multi-strain. High training stress suppresses gut immunity. Improves nutrient absorption.
15g collagen with 50mg vitamin C taken 45 min pre-activity. Stimulates collagen synthesis in connective tissue.
300-600mg KSM-66 extract. Reduces cortisol and perceived stress. Improves sleep quality and recovery time.
0.5-1mg only. Low dose is more effective than high dose. Best for travel across time zones and late-night practice schedules.
3.2g daily. Buffers lactic acid in repeated high-intensity efforts. Best for wrestling rowing lacrosse basketball.
500-1000mg with piperine or phytosome form for bioavailability. Potent anti-inflammatory for chronic joint stress.
400mg nitrate. Increases nitric oxide improving blood flow and O2 efficiency. Strong evidence for swimming rowing soccer.

Timing: With Meals - Separate from other supps
Notes: 5-10g daily. Supports gut health and microbiome diversity. Take separately from other supplements as it can reduce absorption.
500-1000mg daily split dose. Antioxidant support during high training load. Supports iron absorption and immune function.
Use only if blood work confirms deficiency. Bisglycinate form is gentler on GI. Critical for endurance athletes especially females.
Full spectrum B vitamins. Supports energy metabolism and red blood cell production. Important during periods of high stress.
Alternative to monohydrate for athletes with GI sensitivity. Lower dose required (2-3g). Less bloating.
Pea + rice blend for complete amino acid profile. NSF certified. For athletes avoiding dairy or with lactose intolerance.
200-400mg. Reduces mental and physical fatigue under stress. Improves endurance performance and cognitive function.
5-10g daily. Supports gut barrier integrity and immune function during heavy training. Especially useful during preseason.
NSF Certified for Sport alternative to D3+K2 combo. 2000 IU standard dose. Test blood levels to confirm dosing.
NSF Certified alternative magnesium form. Malate supports energy production. Good for athletes who train in morning.
Plant-based DHA/EPA from algae. For athletes avoiding fish products. Same anti-inflammatory benefits as fish oil.
NSF Certified capsule form electrolytes. Convenient for travel and away games. No sugar or artificial colors.
500-1000mg. Supports nerve growth factor and cognitive function. Emerging evidence for athlete focus and recovery.
15-30mg zinc picolinate. Highly bioavailable form. Important for testosterone production and immune function.
